dialogos.texto_en: We'll be in Okinawa soon, huh.
(The graduation ceremony ended smoothly.\n Plus, Ichika passed her special exam and \n was certified to graduate with no issue.)
(We have indeed reached the distant goal we saw\n when we started studying together.)
(The remaining problem is%p-2;――%p;)
(I've been thinking about it until today.\n The answer to give to them.)
(I feel like I'm finally understanding my own feelings.\n During this trip, I have to confirm whether \n those feelings are real.)
We made it! We're in Okinawa!
It's closer than I thought.\nI thought it would take more time.
Airplanes sure are convenient.
Ohhhh?\nDon't you feel like the atmosphere has already changed?\nWhat do you think, Uesugi-san?
Ah, you're right.
(Although the whole airport is in a welcoming mood as \n a tourist destination, there's a relaxed feeling in the air. \n What's it called? Uchina-time?)
Fu-kun? Is something wrong?
No, I just thought the atmosphere\nwas better than I expected.
Yeah, I'm glad we came.
This way, we'll make pleeenty of good memories.
You guys are getting ahead of yourselves.\nWe just arrived, didn't we?
That's right.\nWe haven't even left the airport yet.
Itsuki? Ichika too, are you alright?\nYou've been pretty quiet for a while.
Oh, no.\nNo problems.
Sorry, sorry, I'm fine too.\nMaybe I got a little airsick.
Hey, are you serious?\nMaybe you should rest for a bit?
No, it's not that bad.\nWe're going straight to the hotel today,\nso I'm okay.
Ah, that's right.\nIt's already afternoon,\nso it's difficult to go sightseeing now.
Oh, I almost forgot!\nI haven't told Uesugi-san the details yet.
Here you go.\nIt's the travel guide for this trip.
Thanks.\nDid you go out of your way to make this?\nYou're really enthusiastic.
Tee-hee, I just got carried away.
The itinerary is something we all discussed\nand decided upon.\nI'll give you a brief explanation.
The trip is for six days,\nbut we can use only four days for sightseeing\nbecause the first and last days are for travel.
Tomorrow, we'll visit Kokusai dori and Shurijo Castle.\nThe next day, we'll go to Mihama American Village\nand the Okinawa Prefectural Museum.
On the fourth day, we'll go to Ocean Expo Park.
Ocean Expo Park.\nIf I remember right, that's where Okinawa Churaumi\nAquarium is.
That's right.\nAnd we also plan to visit Kouri Island.
On the last day,\nwe'll play in the ocean and have a barbecue.
I see.\nIt's a well-organized plan, isn't it?
It was hard work narrowing down the options, you know?\nThe more we researched, the more places we wanted to go\nand things we wanted to do.
We should have made it longer.
No, no. Four days of fun\nis already plenty luxurious.\nShould we head straight to the hotel for today?
Yes, let's check in and have dinner.
Got it.\nLet's hurry then.\nI want Ichika to go rest up soon.
Huh?
Thanks, Futaro-kun.\nBut really, I'm fine.
Are you sure?\nDon't push yourself too hard, okay?
I'm telling you, I'm okay.\nYou worry too much.
Then, is it okay to take a taxi?
Wait.\nSince we're in Okinawa,\nI want to ride the Yui Rail.
Yui Rail? Isn't that a monorail?
Yes, it's the only railway in Okinawa.
You're interested, too, right, Futaro?
But isn't the entrance for the Yui Rail somewhere else?
But we have our chance now.\nRight, Futaro?
We'll probably ride it from tomorrow on,\nso let's just take a taxi for today. Right, Fu-kun?
(Huh? Huhhh?\n What's with Nino and Miku competing like this all of\n a sudden? It hasn't happened lately. What's going on?)
Fu-kun?
Futaro?
I don't care either way.
I'm asking because it's not good either way.
Yeah, that's true.\nIt's not as simple as just going with the flow.
But it's not really something to fuss over, is it?
Okay then, let's take a taxi.\nThere seems to be a stop nearby.
Then, shall we head over there?
Oh wait, hold on a second, Itsuki.\nDo you know where it is?
Let's take the Yui Rail.\nI also wanted to try riding it since we came to Okinawa.
That's a good idea. We should definitely ride it\nsince it's the only rail in Okinawa!
Right?\nIt's always interesting to experience things\nthat are unique to a certain place.
Okay, okay, got it.
Then, shall we head over there?
Oh wait, hold on a second, Itsuki.\nDo you know where it is?
Why don't we take the bus?
The bus?
We might be using it a lot during our trip.\nWe should become familiar with it.
That's a good point.\nMaybe we should take the bus here.
Yeah, that makes sense.\nIf Fu-kun says so.
Then, shall we head over there?
Oh wait, hold on a second, Itsuki.\nDo you know where it is?
Let's go, Fu-kun.
Okay.
Hey, Miku, you're too close.\nMove a bit further away, it's hard to walk.
